name: along-working-thread
description: Carry Working Thread continuity, Navi Progress Map behavior, and Challenge Layer validation across active Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Navi Progress Maps and Challenge Layer continuity for active Codex sessions.
interface.longDescription: Navi helps Codex carry project judgment across sessions, give Progress Maps for non-expert users, notice Challenge Moment risks, and turn self-certifying momentum into lightweight validation. The legacy skill id remains along-working-thread. It provides turn-bound self-initiation, not background autonomy or always-on presence.
defaultPrompt: Give me a Navi Progress Map for the current work.
Explain what is done, what remains, and what I need to confirm.
Help me wrap up this phase.
Check whether this direction drifts from our thread.
Check whether this is a self-certification moment.
Turn this challenge into a lightweight validation.
